news.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
news.summary: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group. Revenue has been shrinking in the gaming group, where revenue has also been shrinking.

news.title: Trump plugs Dell at first-ever White House opening bell, sending shares soaring
news.summary: Trump rang the bell in the Oval Office to open Monday's trading. He launched investment accounts for babies born from 2025 through 2028.

news.title: Trump defends call urging Balogun red card review: 'It wasn't a foul'
news.summary: Trump called FIFA President Gianni Infantino about the suspension of Folarin Balogun. "I didn't know what the hell a red card was," said Trump.

news.title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
news.summary: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system. Klarna will be available in the U.S. and Europe, with plans to roll out to other countries.

news.title: SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell to donate stock to Trump Accounts
news.summary: President Donald Trump told CNBC's Joe Kernen last week that he thought SpaceX CEO Elon Musk would donate company stock to the program. Trump said he thought Musk would give stock.

news.title: Silver has plunged 50% from its January peak to $60. Why it could hit $130 next year.
news.summary: Silver may be experiencing a huge disconnect between its traded value and its importance as a critical material. After its dramatic plunge, silver may be experiences a huge disparity between its value and the importance of silver.

news.title: Micron’s stock gains, signaling a ‘return to optimism’ about the chip sector
news.summary: Investors are looking forward to Samsung’s earnings and SK Hynix”s ADR listing, experts say. Samsung is expected to report its quarterly results on Tuesday.

news.title: Trump rings Wall Street opening bells and says the stock market ‘is going to go through the roof’
news.summary: Trump used the occasion to promote the launch of ‘Trump accounts,’ which are special investment accounts for children under age 18. Trump: “I’m a big fan of the Trump brand.”

news.title: TeraWulf’s stock surges after a $19 billion deal with Anthropic
news.summary: The deal “validates” the crypto-mining company’s pivot to supporting the AI buildout, its CEO said.

news.title: ‘The money would have been life-changing’: My father told my grandmother to slash my inheritance. Is that fair?
news.summary: “I could have bought a home for what I hope will be a growing family,” he says. “I can’t believe I’m in a position to do this.”
